edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16
edges.description: The released BF16 checkpoint is the post-trained successor of NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-Base-BF16: stage 1 is base-model pretraining, followed by SFT and RL/RLHF to produce this exact checkpoint.

evidence.excerpt: Stage 1: Pre-Training * NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-Base-BF16 model was pre-trained... Stage 2: Supervised Fine-Tuning ... Stage 3: Reinforcement Learning ... NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-BF16 model is a result of the above work.
evidence.explanation: The subject card explicitly presents the final BF16 release as the result of post-training the named Base checkpoint.

edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16
edges.description: Via stage-1 pretraining inherited from the Base checkpoint, the final BF16 model depends on the released Nemotron pretraining collection.

evidence.excerpt: Major portions of the pre-training corpus are released in the Nemotron-Pre-Training-Datasets collection.
evidence.explanation: The subject card ties stage-1 pretraining of the final model to the Nemotron pretraining collection.

evidence.excerpt: ## Nemotron-Pre-Training-Datasets ... Large scale pre-training datasets used in the Nemotron family of models.
evidence.explanation: This is the authoritative collection named by the subject card.

edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16
edges.description: Through stage-1 base-model pretraining, the final checkpoint depends on Nemotron-CC-v2 as part of the released Nemotron-3-Nano/Nemotron foundation corpus.

evidence.excerpt: The foundation of the model is trained on the Nemotron-3-Nano corpus... Nemotron-CC-v2 & v2.1 9.13T
evidence.explanation: The base model card explicitly lists Nemotron-CC-v2 as part of the pretraining corpus inherited by the final subject.

evidence.excerpt: nvidia/Nemotron-CC-v2.1 ... nvidia/Nemotron-CC-Math-v1 ... nvidia/Nemotron-CC-v2
evidence.explanation: The released pretraining collection contains the named leaf dataset.

edges.description: The final checkpoint also inherits stage-1 pretraining on the newer Nemotron-Pretraining-Specialized-v1.1 synthetic corpus added for Super-era pretraining.

evidence.excerpt: We describe here several new datasets that we added to pretraining since Nemotron 3 Nano ... releasing these datasets on HuggingFace as Nemotron-Pretraining-Specialized-v1.1.
evidence.explanation: The technical report explicitly says these new datasets were added to Super pretraining and released as v1.1.

evidence.excerpt: Designed for the NVIDIA Nemotron 3 family ... Note: These are new datasets, not replacements. They may be used in conjunction with ... Nemotron-Pretraining-Specialized-v1.
evidence.explanation: The released dataset card confirms v1.1 is a Nemotron-3-family pretraining dataset used in conjunction with v1.

edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16

evidence.explanation: The subject card ties stage-2 SFT data for this checkpoint to the post-training collection.

evidence.excerpt: ## Nemotron-Post-Training-v3 ... Collection of datasets used in the post-training phase of Nemotron Nano and Super v3.
evidence.explanation: This is the authoritative collection named by the subject card.

evidence.explanation: The post-training collection for Nemotron Nano and Super v3 lists Nemotron-SFT-Math-v3 as a member.

evidence.excerpt: Nemotron-Math-v3 is a large-scale mathematical reasoning dataset ... suitable for training and evaluating mathematical reasoning systems.
evidence.explanation: The dataset card describes the released math SFT corpus used for model training.

edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16
edges.description: Stage-2 SFT for the final checkpoint includes Nemotron-SFT-Agentic-v2 for tool-use, search, and customer-service-style agent trajectories.

evidence.explanation: The post-training collection for Nemotron Nano and Super v3 lists the agentic SFT dataset.

evidence.excerpt: The Nemotron-SFT-Agentic-v2 dataset is a collection of synthetic single-turn and multi-turn tool-use trajectories ... The tool-calling subset uses DeepSeek-V3.2 and GLM-4.6 for simulation and judging.
evidence.explanation: The dataset card confirms the released agentic dataset and its role in training tool-using models.

edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16
edges.description: Stage-2 SFT for the final checkpoint includes Nemotron-SFT-OpenCode-v1 for OpenCode-style CLI tool use and agent skills.

evidence.excerpt: nvidia/Nemotron-SFT-Agentic-v2 ... nvidia/Nemotron-SFT-OpenCode-v1
evidence.explanation: The post-training collection lists the OpenCode SFT dataset as a Super/Nano v3 post-training member.

evidence.excerpt: Nemotron-SFT-OpenCode-v1 contains the following subsets, where the questions and agent skills are synthetically generated using the GPT OSS 120B model and whose agentic solution traces were generated using Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct.
evidence.explanation: The dataset card directly describes the OpenCode SFT corpus used for training.

edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16

evidence.explanation: The Nemotron post-training collection lists the released SWE v2 SFT dataset.

evidence.explanation: The dataset card directly describes the SWE SFT corpus used for training models.

edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16

evidence.explanation: The OpenCode dataset card confirms Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct generated training traces used by the subject.

edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16
edges.description: gpt-oss-120b generated multiple kinds of training data used by the final checkpoint: low-effort reasoning-mode SFT samples, refreshed instruction/chat dialogues, OpenCode questions and agent skills, and parts of pretraining synthetic code data inherited from the base model.

evidence.explanation: The technical report explicitly states that GPT-OSS-120B generated low-effort SFT samples used to train the subject.

evidence.excerpt: synthetic dialogues generated from ... GPT-OSS-120b
evidence.explanation: The released IF/chat v2 training dataset explicitly names GPT-OSS-120b as one of its dialogue generators.

evidence.excerpt: questions and agent skills are synthetically generated using the GPT OSS 120B model
evidence.explanation: The OpenCode training dataset explicitly names GPT OSS 120B as the generator for training prompts and skills.

edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16
edges.description: gpt-oss-120b also acted as a training-data filter/judge: it filtered synthesized CLI tasks during agentic-programming data construction, and it scored/corrected some pretraining synthetic code samples inherited through the base model.

evidence.excerpt: we employed GPT-OSS 120B ... in an LLM-as-a-Judge framework to filter out tasks
evidence.explanation: This directly supports GPT-OSS-120B serving as a filter/judge in training-data construction for the subject.

evidence.excerpt: we further used gpt-oss-120b to score the correctness of the solution and, if incorrect, to correct it
evidence.explanation: This shows GPT-OSS-120B also performed scoring/filtering on inherited synthetic pretraining code data.

edges.subject: nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-bf16

evidence.explanation: This shows DeepSeek-V3.2 was used to simulate/generate agentic tool-use trajectories that fed subject SFT.

evidence.excerpt: For trajectory construction, we use DeepSeek-V3.2 ... as the primary engine to generate step-by-step solution traces
evidence.explanation: This directly documents DeepSeek-V3.2 generating terminal-use training traces for the subject.

evidence.excerpt: Python Tool-Integrated Reasoning (TIR) solutions are generated using DeepSeek-V3.2.
evidence.explanation: The math-v3 dataset card names DeepSeek-V3.2 as a generator for math training trajectories used by the subject.
